series_metadata.series_description: A W2 is an employer wage and withholding record provided to an individual who had/is employed by this employer. This schedule is for W-2''''''''''''''''s provided by employers to the Department along with their withholding-related forms (IT-3), as opposed to W-2''''''''''''''''s provided by individuals with their income tax returns.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 months after scanning then destroy. If unscanned, 4 years from date of receipt. ; Electronic: An electronic record (scanned or data file format) will be retained for 4 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
